title: Barnard Common Types (v2)
description: Shared definitions for Barnard v2 event and config schemas. Byte-valued fields are encoded as lowercase hex at the SDK/native bridge boundary.

Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with fractional seconds, UTC.

HexBytes.description: Lowercase hex string, even length (may be empty).

RpidHex.description: RPID wire form [formatVersion(1) + RPI(16)] = 17 bytes as 34 lowercase hex chars.

DisplayIdHex.description: v2 displayId = SHA256(TEK)[0:4] = 4 bytes as 8 lowercase hex chars.

TekHex.description: TEK = 16 bytes as 32 lowercase hex chars. Never emitted over BLE; only exposed via explicit host API (exportCurrentTek).

EventCodeHashHex.description: EventCodeHash = SHA256(EventCode)[0:8] = 8 bytes as 16 lowercase hex chars.
